long_description:
[RNOS] Insufficient running pods for deployment is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/sysdig_rnos_insufficient_running_pods_for_deployment.html
TIP Situation: Deployment pod is down
TIP Short Description: Some regional-network-mock pods are not running in in-che-prod01-zone2-rias for the past 10 minutes
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn::::is-network-ips:::in-che-prod01-zone2-rias:microservice:regional-network-mock

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
    kube_deployment_spec_replicas = 3
    kube_pod_sysdig_status_ready = 0
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'in-che-prod01-zone2-rias' and kube_deployment_name = 'regional-network-mock'
Scope:
    kube_deployment_name in ('regional-network-mock', 'regional-vpe', 'regional-dnlb', 'regional-flow-logs', 'regional-network-controller', 'regional-vpe-controller', 'regional-migration-server')

Time:             12/09/2025 04:18 PM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://jp-tok.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/c4d3715d-0da1-4560-b427-a468361b4a5e?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F38622811%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Name:         [RNOS] Insufficient running pods for deployment
Description:  Some replica pods in the deployment is not running for the past 10 minutes
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    kube_deployment_name in ('regional-network-mock', 'regional-vpe', 'regional-dnlb', 'regional-flow-logs', 'regional-network-controller', 'regional-vpe-controller', 'regional-migration-server')
Segment by:   kube_cluster_name, kube_deployment_name
Alert When:   sum(max(kube_pod_sysdig_status_ready)) < avg(min(kube_deployment_spec_replicas))
Time Aggregation: 10 m
Alert URL:    https://jp-tok.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/c4d3715d-0da1-4560-b427-a468361b4a5e?redirectRoute=%2Falerts%2Frules%3FalertId%3D573869
